---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, event, or SimVar
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like added?**
Describe the feature — a new MCP tool, a missing SimConnect event, an untracked SimVar, etc.

**Why is it useful?**
What flight scenario or workflow does it enable?

**References**
Link to the relevant MSFS SDK docs if applicable:
- Events: https://docs.flightsimulator.com/html/Programming_Tools/Event_IDs/Event_IDs.htm
- SimVars: https://docs.flightsimulator.com/html/Programming_Tools/SimVars/Simulation_Variables.htm
